title: ampelopsis glandulosa var. hancei
intro: Ampelopsis glandulosa var. hancei, also known as Chinese wine grape or Mai Men Dong, is a type of vine native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Ampelopsis glandulosa var. hancei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include dried roots, which can be consumed as a tea or used in combination with other herbs to create a decoction or tincture.
